driveId.description: Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression

folderId.description: Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression

documentURL.description: The ID in the document URL (or just paste the whole URL)

simple.description: Whether to return a simplified version of the response instead of the raw data

actionsUi.description: Actions applied to update the document

insertSegment.description: The location where to create the object

segmentId.description: The ID of the header, footer or footnote. The Document → Get operation lists all segment IDs (make sure you disable the simple toggle).

index.description: The zero-based index, relative to the beginning of the specified segment (use index + 1 to refer to a table)

name.description: The name of the Named Range. Names do not need to be unique.

startIndex.description: The zero-based start index of this range

endIndex.description: The zero-based end index of this range

bulletPreset.description: The Preset pattern of bullet glyphs for list

BULLET_DISC_CIRCLE_SQUARE.description: A bulleted list with a DISC, CIRCLE and SQUARE bullet glyph for the first 3 list nesting levels

BULLET_CHECKBOX.description: A bulleted list with CHECKBOX bullet glyphs for all list nesting levels

NUMBERED_DECIMAL_NESTED.description: A numbered list with DECIMAL numeric glyphs separated by periods, where each nesting level uses the previous nesting level's glyph as a prefix. For example: 1., 1.1., 2., 2.2 .

footerId.description: The ID of the footer to delete. To retrieve it, use the get document where you can find under footers attribute.

headerId.description: The ID of the header to delete. To retrieve it, use the get document where you can find under headers attribute.

namedRangeReference.description: The value determines which range or ranges to delete

objectId.description: The ID of the positioned object to delete (An object that is tied to a paragraph and positioned relative to its beginning), See the Google documentation

locationChoice.description: The location where the text will be inserted

endOfSegmentLocation.description: Inserts the text at the end of a header, footer, footnote, or document body

rows.description: The number of rows in the table

columns.description: The number of columns in the table

text.description: The text to search for in the document

replaceText.description: The text that will replace the matched text

matchCase.description: Whether the search should respect case sensitivity

control.description: Determines how the changes are applied to the revision

targetRevisionId.description: Apply changes to the latest revision. Otherwise changes will not be processed.

requiredRevisionId.description: Apply changes to the provided revision while incorporating other collaborators' changes. This mode is used for the recent revision, Otherwise changes will not be processed.

control.description: Determines how the changes are applied to the revision

targetRevisionId.description: Apply changes to the latest revision. Otherwise changes will not be processed.

requiredRevisionId.description: Apply changes to the provided revision while incorporating other collaborators' changes. This mode is used for the recent revision, Otherwise changes will not be processed.
